generateText() is inside generate() closure, which is always called inside a try-catch (index.ts:217-245). The catch calls handleError() which specifically handles RetryError (quota/rate-limit) and APICallError (auth, network, invalid-request).

generateObject() is inside generate() closure, which is always called inside a try-catch (index.ts:383-427). The catch calls handleError() which handles all AI SDK error types including schema validation errors.

expire() is a thin pass-through utility. All callers are in API route handlers wrapped by withMiddleware which has a generic catch-all for unhandled errors, ensuring network errors never crash the process.

client.delete() is called on an ApiClient instance (HTTP REST wrapper), not a Supabase client. The variable is created by local createClient() (main.ts:270) returning new ApiClient(config). No Supabase is used in this file.
createLogger() is a local async function (lines 86-102) wrapping @/utils/logger. Winston is not imported or used in this file. The corpus matched the function name only.
